# Third-Party Notices — Vendored Avalonia Headless TUnit Integration

The four files in this directory are vendored from the following source:

- **Repository:** https://github.com/JohnCampionJr/Avalonia (fork of AvaloniaUI/Avalonia)
- **Branch:** tunit
- **Commit:** ed86219a7d3a188eaa347c61eea37ded1add92ee
- **Path:** src/Headless/Avalonia.Headless.TUnit/

Files vendored:
- `AvaloniaTestAttribute.cs`
- `AvaloniaClassConstructor.cs`
- `AvaloniaTestExecutor.cs`
- `AvaloniaTestPipeline.cs`

These files have not been published as a stable NuGet package for the Avalonia 11.x series.
They are included verbatim (with attribution headers) to provide TUnit integration
for the headless test harness without a dependency on an unstable or forked package.
